candidate_definitions.text: Implementation for the paper "Hierarchical Conditional Relation Networks for Video Question Answering" (Le et al., CVPR 2020, Oral)

We introduce a general-purpose reusable neural unit called Conditional Relation Network (CRN) that encapsulates and transforms an array of tensorial objects into a new array of the same kind, conditioned on a contextual feature. The flexibility of CRN units is then examined in s…
